title: 驚RFID的話 大家可不必帶身份證出街

replies.msg:
https://www.info.gov.hk/gia/general/201502/25/P201502250583.htm
身份證明文件包括（但不限於）有效身份證
proof of identity in relation to any persons includes, but is not limited to, his valid identity card.

下 列 資 料 撮 錄 自 香 港 法 例 第 115 章 《 入 境 條 例 》 ， 以 說 明 法 例 規 定 公 眾 須 攜 帶 身 份 證 明 文 件 和 賦 予 入 境 事 務 隊 成 員 查 閱 身 份 證 明 文 件 的 權 力 :

根 據 第 17 B 條 ， “ 身 份 證 明 文 件 ” 就 任 何 人 而 言 ， 包 括 ：
(a) 他 的 有 效 身 份 證 ；
(b) 由 人 事 登 記 處 處 長 發 出 的 文 件 ， 表 明 該 人 已 申 請 ：
(i) 根 據 《 人 事 登 記 條 例 》 ( 第 177 章 ) 予 以 登 記 ； 或
(ii) 根 據 《 人 事 登 記 規 例 》 ( 第 177 章 ， 附 屬 法 例 ) 第 13 或 14 條 發 給 新 身 份 證 ；
(c) 他 所 持 有 的 有 效 旅 行 證 件 ； 或
(d) 獲 發 給 的 越 南 難 民 證 。

Under section 17B, "proof of identity" in relation to any person includes the following documents:
(a) his valid identity card;
(b) a document issued by the Commissioner of Registration acknowledging that that person has applied:
(i) to be registered under the Registration of Persons Ordinance (Cap. 177); or
(ii) for a new identity card under regulation 13 or 14 of the Registration of Persons Regulations (Cap. 177 sub. leg.);
(c) a valid travel document held by him; or
(d) a Vietnamese refugee card issued to him.

replies.msg:
Do epassport use RFID tags?

￼
ePassports do NOT use RFID tags. They use RF-enabled contactless smart card technology that is much more secure and powerful than RFID.
RFID (Radio Frequency IDentification) tags broadcast an unencrypted ID number using radio waves. Used mostly in manufacturing, shipping and object-related tracking, they can be read at long distances of 30 feet or more and offer minimal security and privacy protection.
In contrast, think of contactless smart card technology as a computer with security software and wireless communication for very short distances of an inch or two. These advanced capabilities make the epassport a more secure travel document than a conventional passport, and protect the privacy and safety of the passport holder.


https://www.justaskgemalto.com/en/do-epassport-use-rfid-tags/

不少國家的私隱權活動人士均質疑護照晶片儲存何種個人數據，問題在於其數據透過免接觸RFID無線傳輸進行，使之成為重大漏洞，有心人士可利用特定儀器套取個人數據，假如其數據未經加密處理，則可引致嚴重後果。


https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Biometric_passport#Attacks

quote.msg: 我唔肯定本護照有無RFID

Do epassport use RFID tags?

￼
ePassports do NOT use RFID tags. They use RF-enabled contactless smart card technology that is much more secure and powerful than RFID.
RFID (Radio Frequency IDentification) tags broadcast an unencrypted ID number using radio waves. Used mostly in manufacturing, shipping and object-related tracking, they can be read at long distances of 30 feet or more and offer minimal security and privacy protection.
In contrast, think of contactless smart card technology as a computer with security software and wireless communication for very short distances of an inch or two. These advanced capabilities make the epassport a more secure travel document than a conventional passport, and protect the privacy and safety of the passport holder.


https://www.justaskgemalto.com/en/do-epassport-use-rfid-tags/

replies.msg:
同係咪 tag 冇關係喎
所謂 "RF-enabled contactless smart card technology" 係指 ISO/IEC 14443 標準嘅 contactless IC card，同 NFC 部份兼容，一樣用 13.56 MHz RFID 無線頻率
同新身份證同一樣嘅技術
